tags.description: Nestled along a Shenandoah Mountain drainage in Pendleton County, WV, Camp Run provides an opportunity for primitive 1950’s style camping that is popular with hunters.
tags.name: Camp Run Campground
tags.operator: US Forest Service, George Washington & Jefferson National Forests, North River Ranger District
